pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires the agent to create a tiddler with this exact title. Verified in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
Task description explicitly requires tagging with 'Technology' and 'API'. Verified in export_result.sh.
Task description explicitly requires internal links to these targets. Both are present in the synthetic seed_tiddlers.json dataset. Checked in export_result.sh.
Task description explicitly states 'Write at least 80 words.' Evaluated dynamically by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
The export_result.sh script explicitly greps for these keywords ('rest|restful', 'api', 'http|GET|POST|PUT|DELETE') and the python verifier awards points for their presence in the generated text.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a new tiddler dynamically with a required title ('RESTful API Design Guide'), tags ('Technology', 'API'), and word count limit (>= 80 words). The task also demands linking to two pre-existing tiddlers ('Agile Methodology Overview' and 'Version Control Best Practices') which are verified to be present in the synthetically generated wiki seed data (seed_tiddlers.json). The verifier dynamically checks for the presence of the keywords 'REST', 'API', and 'HTTP' (or related verbs) to validate content quality.
